_publications._publicationTitle: Identifying Symptoms of Distress in Youth Living with Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1).

_contextSnippet: The average performance status score was 92.5 for children under 18...Performance status scores were significantly correlated to DT scores for medical provider ratings and patient ratings, for patients under 18 (r = −.27, p < .05 for patient rating and r = −.42, p < .001 for medical provider rating).
details: Average performance status score was 92.5 for children under 18. Performance status scores were significantly correlated to DT scores for medical provider ratings (r = −.42, p < .001) and patient ratings (r = −.27, p < .05) for patients under 18
